objects.name: Enterprise Remediation Benchmark: How Does Your Organization Compare?
objects.description: Executive Summary In the last 12 months, enterprises deployed millions of patches, yet many organizations remain exposed due to delayed remediation and unpatched third-party software. Key benchmarks from global enterprise environments: Over 8 million Google Chrome patches were deployed. Visual C++ and .NET remained among the most delayed in patching.

external_references.description: Enterprise Remediation Benchmark: How Does Your Organization Compare?
